title: Awintour
description: Full-stack tour booking platform — user auth, admin dashboard, wishlists, reviews & Stripe payments
impact: User authentication, admin dashboard, wishlists, reviews, and Stripe payment integration

title: Defino
description: A smart, clean English dictionary PWA. Instant definitions, pronunciations, synonyms, antonyms, etymology, voice search, flashcard quiz, and share cards.
impact: Instant word definitions, pronunciations, synonyms, antonyms, etymology, voice search, flashcard quiz, and share cards

title: eBuy
description: A full-stack luxury e-commerce platform with a customer storefront, multi-step checkout, order management, and a complete admin panel for products, analytics, marketing, and store settings.
impact: End-to-end commerce — from product browsing to order persistence with server-verified pricing

title: FreshSpin
description: A responsive landing page for a premium laundry pickup and delivery service, featuring animated sections for services, tiered pricing, a 4-step process walkthrough, customer testimonials, an FAQ accordion, a postcode-based service area checker, and a validated booking/contact form with pickup scheduling.
impact: Conversion-focused single-page site — from trust-building social proof to a pre-filled booking form driven by pricing CTA clicks
